---
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false

execute:
  cache: false
  echo: false
  warnings: false
  error: false
---

```{r}
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
source("../../_common.R")
status(type = "polishing")
```

## Svarm 2000-2025

The number of isolates of different matrices reported in Svarm since 2000 is available as supplementary material on the 
[SVA web page](https://www.sva.se/en/what-we-do/antibiotics/svarm-resistance-monitoring/supplementary-material/).
